summary: Added three preflight checks to finalize: (1) reject non-canonical state file paths (.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json and .polaris/runs/current-state.json), (2) validate cluster_id matches current branch (case-insensitive, hyphen-normalized), (3) validate state.branch matches current git branch when non-empty. All checks execute before Step 4 with clear error messages.
